item.title: eSUN PLA+ Filament 1.75mm 3D Printer Filament PLA Plus Maatnauwkeurigheid +/- 0.03mm 1kg Spoel 2.2 LBS 3D Print Filament voor 3D Printers Zwart
item.description: There’s a deal eSUN PLA+ Filament 1.75mm 3D Printer Filament PLA Plus Maatnauwkeurigheid +/- 0.03mm 1kg Spoel 2.2 LBS 3D Print Filament voor 3D Printers Zwart here: ℹ️: 【Goede Bedrukbaarheid】 PLA+ houdt alle voordelen van PLA, gemakkelijk om als gewone PLA, lage inkrimping, geen misvorming, geen barsten, hoge drukprecisie te drukken. Wijd gebruikt in machines, elektronische apparaten, autos, decoratie, COSPLAY en andere punten. 【Dimensionale Tolerantie +/- 0,03mm】eSUN PLA+ 3D printer filamenten zijn vervaardigd met nauwkeurigere specificaties.

item.title: SUNLU PLA Plus Filament 1.75mm for 3D Printer & 3D Pens 1KG 2.2LBS PLA+ 3D Filament Tolerance Accuracy +/- 0.02 mm Grey
item.description: There’s a deal SUNLU PLA Plus Filament 1.75mm for 3D Printer & 3D Pens 1KG 2.2LBS PLA+ 3D Filament Tolerance Accuracy +/- 0.02 mm Grey here: ℹ️: 【More Details】SUNLU 3D printer filament are Vacuum packed, neatly arranged to prevent entanglement, 100% no bubbles. 【Life-time Guarantee】24-hour professional after-sales consultation to provide you with meticulous care and best solutions. 【Smooth And Delicate】PLA Plus 1.75mm has better toughness, and the printed material is very smooth, and the texture after printing is more delicate.

item.title: SUNLU PLA Plus Filament 1.75mm for 3D Printer & 3D Pens 1KG 2.2LBS PLA+ 3D Filament Tolerance Accuracy +/- 0.02 mm White
item.description: You can find SUNLU PLA Plus Filament 1.75mm for 3D Printer & 3D Pens 1KG 2.2LBS PLA+ 3D Filament Tolerance Accuracy +/- 0.02 mm White with a discount here: ℹ️: 【Smooth And Delicate】PLA Plus 1.75mm has better toughness, and the printed material is very smooth, and the texture after printing is more delicate. 【Advanced Production】SUNLU 3D filament 1.75mm has the lowest tolerance value in the entire 3D printing filament industry, amazingly reached 1.
